name: menubar
title: Menubar
description: A desktop-style bar of dropdown menus.

files.content:
{#snippet children({ checked, indeterminate })} {#if indeterminate}
{:else if checked} {/if} {@render childrenProp?.()} {/snippet}

<script lang="ts">
	import { Menubar as MenubarPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		sideOffset = 8,
		align = 'start',
		portalProps,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<MenubarPrimitive.ContentProps> & {
		portalProps?: MenubarPrimitive.PortalProps;
	} = $props();
</script>

<MenubarPrimitive.Portal {...portalProps}>
	<MenubarPrimitive.Content
		bind:ref
		{sideOffset}
		{align}
		class={cn(
			'z-50 min-w-[12rem] overflow-hidden rounded-xl glass-strong border border-[color:var(--glass-border)] p-1 text-popover-foreground shadow-glass transition-[opacity,transform] duration-150 data-[state=closed]:scale-95 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=open]:scale-100 data-[state=open]:opacity-100',
			className
		)}
		{...restProps}
	/>
</MenubarPrimitive.Portal>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Menubar as MenubarPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		inset,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<MenubarPrimitive.ItemProps> & {
		inset?: boolean;
	} = $props();
</script>

<MenubarPrimitive.Item
	bind:ref
	data-inset={inset ? '' : undefined}
	class={cn(
		'relative flex cursor-pointer select-none items-center gap-2 rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5 text-sm outline-none transition-colors duration-100 data-[highlighted]:bg-accent data-[highlighted]:text-accent-foreground data-[disabled]:pointer-events-none data-[disabled]:opacity-50 data-[inset]:pl-8 [&_svg]:size-4 [&_svg]:shrink-0',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Menubar as MenubarPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		inset,
		...restProps
	}: MenubarPrimitive.GroupHeadingProps & {
		inset?: boolean;
	} = $props();
</script>

<MenubarPrimitive.GroupHeading
	bind:ref
	data-inset={inset ? '' : undefined}
	class={cn('px-2 py-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground data-[inset]:pl-8', className)}
	{...restProps}
/>
{#snippet children({ checked })} {#if checked} {/if} {@render childrenProp?.()} {/snippet}

<script lang="ts">
	import { Menubar as MenubarPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: MenubarPrimitive.SeparatorProps = $props();
</script>

<MenubarPrimitive.Separator
	bind:ref
	class={cn('-mx-1 my-1 h-px bg-[color:var(--glass-border)]', className)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Menubar as MenubarPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: MenubarPrimitive.SubContentProps = $props();
</script>

<MenubarPrimitive.SubContent
	bind:ref
	class={cn(
		'z-50 min-w-[8rem] overflow-hidden rounded-xl glass-strong border border-[color:var(--glass-border)] p-1 text-popover-foreground shadow-glass transition-[opacity,transform] duration-150 data-[state=closed]:scale-95 data-[state=closed]:opacity-0 data-[state=open]:scale-100 data-[state=open]:opacity-100',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Menubar as MenubarPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { ChevronRight } from '@lucide/svelte';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		inset,
		children,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<MenubarPrimitive.SubTriggerProps> & {
		inset?: boolean;
	} = $props();
</script>

<MenubarPrimitive.SubTrigger
	bind:ref
	data-inset={inset ? '' : undefined}
	class={cn(
		'relative flex cursor-pointer select-none items-center gap-2 rounded-lg px-2 py-1.5 text-sm outline-none transition-colors duration-100 data-[highlighted]:bg-accent data-[highlighted]:text-accent-foreground data-[state=open]:bg-accent data-[state=open]:text-accent-foreground data-[disabled]:pointer-events-none data-[disabled]:opacity-50 data-[inset]:pl-8 [&_svg]:size-4 [&_svg]:shrink-0',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
>
	{@render children?.()}
	<ChevronRight class="ml-auto size-4" />
</MenubarPrimitive.SubTrigger>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Menubar as MenubarPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: MenubarPrimitive.TriggerProps = $props();
</script>

<MenubarPrimitive.Trigger
	bind:ref
	class={cn(
		'flex cursor-pointer select-none items-center rounded-lg px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium outline-none transition-colors duration-100 focus-visible:bg-accent data-[highlighted]:bg-accent data-[highlighted]:text-accent-foreground data-[state=open]:bg-accent data-[state=open]:text-accent-foreground',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Menubar as MenubarPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		value = $bindable(''),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: MenubarPrimitive.RootProps = $props();
</script>

<MenubarPrimitive.Root
	bind:ref
	bind:value
	class={cn(
		'flex h-10 items-center gap-1 rounded-xl glass border border-[color:var(--glass-border)] p-1 shadow-bevel',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
/>
